heroHeadline: Day 43: US Negotiators in Islamabad for Ceasefire Talks; Israel Strikes Lebanese Government Building, Kills Officers
heroSubtitle: US negotiators arrive in Islamabad to continue ceasefire talks with Iran as both sides seek a dialogue framework. Overnight, an Israeli airstrike on a Lebanese government building killed multiple Lebanese military officers, and Hezbollah rockets damaged a 1,500-year-old church inside Israel — underscoring the Lebanon front's threat to the fragile truce.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-11. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal, The Independent.
